nasb.text: So you will stumble by day, And the prophet also will stumble with you by night; And I will destroy your mother.

esv.text: You shall stumble by day; the prophet also shall stumble with you by night; and I will destroy your mother.

cnv.text: 白天你要跌倒， 晚上先知也必與你一同跌倒； 我要毀滅你的母親。

ccb.text: 你们白天黑夜都要跌倒， 先知也要跟你们一起跌倒， 所以我要毁灭你们的母亲以色列。
